notes: Source of truth for the item editor (amulet tab). DCSS base types from item-prop-enum.h jewellery_type enum: AMU_REFLECTION/REGENERATION/FAITH/GUARDIAN_SPIRIT/RAGE/HARM/MANA_REGENERATION/ACROBAT. Single equip slot. Amulets carry the run-flavoring tradeoffs — mostly utility over raw stats.

amulet_rage.label: Amulet of Rage
amulet_rage.flavor: Berserker trigger. Damage at the cost of safety.

amulet_harm.label: Amulet of Harm
amulet_harm.flavor: Trade defense for damage. Glass cannon.

amulet_guardian.label: Amulet of Guardian
amulet_guardian.flavor: Damage routes through HP and MP. Survival.

amulet_acrobat.label: Amulet of Acrobat
amulet_acrobat.flavor: Bonus dodge while moving. Mobile build.

fortified.desc: Future: flat damage reduction. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

regen.desc: Future: HP regen tick. Currently: Regen affix bonus.

reflective.desc: Future: reflect ranged attacks. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

faith.desc: Future: stronger altar blessings. Currently: no bonus.

rage.desc: Future: berserk trigger at low HP. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

harm.desc: Future: +damage dealt, +damage taken. Currently: Crit affix bonus.

guardian.desc: Future: damage routes via mana pool. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

acrobat.desc: Future: dodge bonus while moving. Currently: Crit affix bonus.

willpower.desc: Future: magic resistance. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

elemental.desc: Future: multi-element resistance. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

lordly.desc: Future: aura buff to bot. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

fortune.desc: Future: bonus gold/loot. Currently: no bonus.

vitality.desc: Future: +max HP. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

items.name: Bone Pendant
items.lore: Bone wrapped in twine. Bleached by something.

items.name: Cylinder Amulet
items.lore: Hollow lead. Rattles.

items.name: Blue Cameo
items.lore: A face carved into shell. Looks vaguely benevolent.

items.name: Celtic Knot Amulet
items.lore: Endless knot. Heals slow.

items.name: Standing Stone
items.lore: Smooth stone with a hole bored through. Older than language.

items.name: Ring Pendant
items.lore: Glows when its wearer is angry. Often.

items.name: Knot of the Faithful
items.lore: Worn by pilgrims. Their gods listen back.

items.name: Watching Eye
items.lore: It tracks across the room. So does its wearer.

items.name: Bleeding Stone
items.lore: Always slightly damp. Always. The wearer cuts deeper.

items.name: Verdant Pendant
items.lore: Living crystal. Drinks light to heal its wearer.

items.name: Sea-Worn Stone
items.lore: Smooth as a tide pool. Watches.

items.name: Pentacle of Wrath
items.lore: Five points. Each one a name burned in.

items.name: Saintly Visage
items.lore: Cast in gold. Probably copies a real face.

items.name: Verdant Cabochon
items.lore: The wearer's center of gravity shifts.

items.name: Bloodstone Pendant
items.lore: It hungers. The wearer's edges sharpen, their guard slips.

items.name: Veiled Sigil
items.lore: A purple sigil floats above the stone, slightly above. Always.

items.name: Pearl of Vitality
items.lore: Bright. Still. Growing slowly.

items.name: Sigil of the Last Line
items.lore: Five points held tight. Whatever crosses, returns.

items.name: King's Cameo
items.lore: Worn by a king who outlived his enemies. Most of them.

items.name: Amulet of Vitality
items.lore: Worn by those who refused to fall.

items.name: Amulet of Air
items.lore: Cool wind around the wearer's neck. Always.

items.name: Amulet of Bloodlust
items.lore: Beats slightly faster than the wearer's heart. Always slightly faster.

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.lore: A faint shimmer surrounds the wearer in any light.

items.name: Cekugob's Amulet
items.lore: Cekugob never died. The amulet is the proof.

items.name: The Four Winds
items.lore: Four directions held in one circle. Each promises something.

items.name: The Finger
items.lore: A real finger. Old. Don't ask whose.
Carved from one piece of imperial jade. Fault-lines make patterns.
items.name: Jade-forged Bleeding Stone

items.lore: Volcanic glass, edge-flaked razor-sharp by patient hands.
items.name: Obsidian Cekugob's Amulet

items.lore: An alloy out of fashion in this century. The shine is unmistakable.
items.name: Rose-gold The Finger

items.lore: Smithed somewhere between worlds. The shadow it casts is wrong.
items.name: Voidwrought Pearl of Vitality

items.lore: Damp green spores drift from every notch — they twitch toward warm flesh.
items.name: Mossy Sigil of the Last Line

items.lore: Vines crawl over the haft, seeking soil that is not there.
items.name: Verdant Amulet of Air

items.lore: Hard to see in dim light, even when held directly before you.
items.name: Shadowed Cekugob's Amulet

items.lore: Smithed somewhere between worlds. The shadow it casts is wrong.
items.name: Voidwrought Bleeding Stone

items.lore: A rime of ice will not melt, no matter how warm the room.
items.name: Frostbound Voidwrought Bleeding Stone

items.lore: The metal is warm even at midnight. Undead dare not touch it.
items.name: Sunsteel Bloodstone Pendant

items.lore: It is somehow always slightly cooler than its surroundings.
items.name: Spectral Voidwrought Bleeding Stone

items.lore: Carries its own slow heat. Embers drift from it when struck.
items.name: Embered Verdant Cabochon

items.lore: Plain forged iron, but heavier than the metal alone explains.
items.name: Ironclad Pentacle of Wrath

items.lore: Carved from one piece of imperial jade. Fault-lines make patterns.
items.name: Jade-forged Saintly Visage
Mantle of the Eight
items.lore: Each tentacle reads a different sky.

items.name: Sangromancer's Locket
items.lore: A fingerbone in red glass. The bone is yours.

items.name: Pharaoh's Relic Amulet
items.lore: Older than the curse. Older than the mummy who carried it.

items.name: Granite Mantle
items.lore: Heavy enough that the wearer never quite straightens.

items.name: Luck-Bound Sling Bag
items.lore: Always one coin heavier than you remember leaving it.

items.name: Kirke's Pendant
items.lore: Its setting is shaped like a pig. The wearer notices things that weren't always pigs.

items.name: Boris's Necromantic Phylactery
items.lore: Boris's piece of himself, neatly preserved. Now yours, if you find a way.

items.name: Iron Token
items.lore: A pierced slug of pig iron. Heavier than it looks.

items.name: Archmagi's Focus
items.lore: A facet cut so finely it sings when a spell is spoken near it.

items.name: Galewing Pendant
items.lore: A feather pinned in glass. Always pointing into the wind.

items.name: Amulet of the Ice Shrine
items.lore: Worn by the pilgrim who forgot why she came. Cold preserves both questions and answers.
